name: Nicotinamide riboside in aged men's skeletal muscle
summary: A randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled crossover trial of 1 g/day nicotinamide riboside for 21 days in aged men, with skeletal-muscle NAD-metabolome, transcriptomic, inflammatory, and mitochondrial bioenergetic endpoints.
population: Aged men, median age about 75 years
